messages.content: Not too sure, Hit up the email for that mate, our band booker knows all that sort of stuff (edited)
Hit up the email for that mate, our band booker knows all that sort of stuff
Totally understand, thanks for the reply! Do you potentially know any of the bands that are playing from the 21st-23rd? Thinking we could hit them up to try jump on their lineup!
Hey guys unfortunately we are all booked up until the new year, for any bookings hit our email oakbandbooking@gmail.com

Hey there, hope youâre doing well!

We are a two piece Naarm group called Lover, and are looking for a venue to play at for our final stop on our tour up the east coast which we are planning from 12th-(22nd?) of november. 
We have been in contact with a few Newcastle bands who are down to put something together, is there any chance you have available slots on that week (friday 21st to sunday 23rd of november?) 

Looking forward to hearing back :)

Youtube - https://www.youtube.com/@loverloverr
Spotify - https://open.spotify.com/artist/6LmFqUjTbui4uj86QwO08z?si=54jEqQjdQZOWuX-4lwZkdw

Much love,
Will and Johnny from Lover
